narrative:
Kingsville Twp township has 1,186 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a clear Republican lean of 8.4 percentage points.
